rationale: The cited paper is used as the methodological basis for interpreting an interaction in Study 4c. The authors explicitly state they use the Johnson-Neyman floodlight analysis and cite Spiller et al. (2013) when identifying the moderator range where the simple effect is significant. This is a functional analytic use in the paper's results section, not just a background list citation.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s floodlight/Johnson-Neyman probing approach to test and report conditional effects of referral type across levels of reputational concern.
